notes: CodificationSection, acts , ; , ; , § 706(a), , ; , , , which authorized heads of departments to grant easements for rights-of-way on “the public lands, national forests, and reservations of the United States” for electrical power and communications purposes, was omitted because its provisions, as they related to System units, were repealed by and because act , is also classified to , Public Lands.
